nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Getting-started guide for the RisingWave-to-Redis sink demo, covering setup steps, how to run the integration test, and expected outputs.

nodes.name: create_source.sql
nodes.summary: Defines two RisingWave source tables (user_behaviors and redis_types) used to feed the Redis sink integration test with rich type coverage.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines two sources covering an extensive set of types including arrays, JSONB, and nested structs to test Redis type serialization.

nodes.name: create_mv.sql
nodes.summary: Creates a materialized view over the user_behaviors source to aggregate data before sinking to Redis.

nodes.name: create_sink.sql
nodes.summary: Creates multiple Redis sink definitions exercising different modes (append-only, upsert, type coverage), connecting RisingWave materialized views to Redis.

nodes.name: docker-compose.yml
nodes.summary: Docker Compose file spinning up RisingWave and Redis instances for the Redis sink connector integration test.
